title: Nursery Rhyme. DXVII. Natural History.
content:
There was an owl lived in an oak,
            Wisky, wasky, weedle;
        And every word he ever spoke
            Was fiddle, faddle, feedle.

        A gunner chanced to come that way,
            Wisky, wasky, weedle;
        Says he, "I'll shoot you, silly bird."
            Fiddle, faddle, feedle.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DXVII. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
